2. [*False beliefs*]{.underline}: draw the expected future state from a prior *belief* $p(s)$ over state 
$$\begin{aligned}
&P(a' \mid p(s), o, d) \propto \exp(\alpha EU_{p(s), o, d}[a']) \qquad p(s \mid o) \propto p(s)p(o \mid s) \\
&EU_{p(s),o,d}[a] = \underset{s \sim p(s | o)}{\mathbb{E}} \left[ \frac{1}{1 + kd}U(s,a) + \underset{s',~o',~a'}{\mathbb{E}}[EU_{p(s | o), o', d + 1}[a']] \right]
\end{aligned}$$
